lessons.title: Latent Image Formation and Inherent Unsharpness
objectives: Explain how the latent image forms in the film emulsion
Describe inherent unsharpness and its contribution to total unsharpness
cp105Topics: Technique 3.1 Formation of the latent image on film

lessons.title: Exposure Arithmetic and Exposure Charts
objectives: Apply the milliamperage-distance-time relationship and reciprocity law
Use X-ray and gamma ray exposure charts to set technique parameters
Calculate exposure time for gamma and X-ray sources including inverse square corrections
cp105Topics: Technique 3.3.4 X-ray exposure charts - material thickness, kV, and exposure
Technique 3.3.7 Calculation of exposure time for gamma and X-ray sources

lessons.title: Characteristic Curves, Film Speed, and Film Selection
objectives: Interpret the characteristic (Hurter and Driffield) curve of a film
Compare film speed and class descriptions
Select an appropriate film for a given application
cp105Topics: Technique 3.5 Film speed and class descriptions
Technique 3.6 Selection of film for particular purpose
